- **C. Memory Candidates:** 4 items flagged (bug context, persona update, deprecated skill, unresolved tool bug).
- **D. Improvement Candidates:** 4 issues identified (token overflow, unresolved tool, missing test harness, cross-session coordination overhead).
- **E. Verdict:** Active window, high signal quality. Strategic progress on hard problems, but execution completeness mixed.
